title: 見つけて！私らしさと自分勝手の境界線

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, I'm visiting Chukyo Racecourse with
Kawakami Princess.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
...Ahhh, the Princess Fighter show was so much
fun.

text_block_list.name: Princess Fighter
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, everyone! Your cheers have reached
my heart!

text_block_list.name: Princess Fighter
text_block_list.text:
I'll transform the land's energy into my power and
shine brighter than anyone else! Princess Rising!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Ugyaaahhh! Curse yooou!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Princess Fighter is just amazing, isn't she? She's
spunky and cool and cute, not to mention
graceful and true to herself.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I really thought I could become just like her...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But I'm just a self-centered person who hurts
others.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Male Spectator
text_block_list.text:
Hey, the Takamatsunomiya Kinen is starting!
Look at the paddock!

text_block_list.name: Female Spectator
text_block_list.text:
Really?! That first-rate Umamusume is running,
too, right? Hehe, how exciting!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Yes.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! Fear not, for I am here—the first-rate
Umamusume, King Halo!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, it's King! Has she come to claim the king's
throne again this year?!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Isn't she past her time already? How long is she
gonna keep trying to stay relevant?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: What?! Can you believe what that person just said about King?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Unforgivable! I have to do something about this! I
can't let someone get away with that kind of
bad-mouthi—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ATTENTION!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Please don't misunderstand, everyone.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The only person who can decide what I do is
myself. My actions don't concern you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You're free to have your opinions and to say
whatever you like.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Still, I'll grant you the right to watch me—watch
as I remain true to myself and carve out my own
path.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, King Halo runs in the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen. As for the result...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
King Halo wins! With a jaw-dropping display of
dominance, King Halo claims first place!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! Did you see my graceful, magnificent
running?!

text_block_list.name: Defeated Umamusume
text_block_list.text: ...Drat.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
That's the first-rate Umamusume we love! Are you
aiming to conquer the Dual Sprints again this
year?!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
You should quit while you're ahead and end your
career on a high note. Why keep fighting to
satisfy your ego? I feel bad for the younger
racers.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: You think I'm being selfish?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ha. Don't make me laugh. I simply walk my own
path, as my own individual.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Is that being selfish, or is that being true to
myself? Only I have the right to make that
judgment.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
choice_data_list:
Being self-centered and being yourself are two
separate things.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not wanting to hurt others is an admirable trait.
On the other hand, staying true to your path
means you may hurt someone along the way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For every victor, there is a loser. Justice for one is
not justice for all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The question is—are those actions born from your
ego, or your individuality?
choice_data_list: You're the only one who gets to decide that.
You're the only one who gets to decide that.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Only I... can decide...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That night, outside the student dorms...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You were at today's Takamatsunomiya Kinen,
right, Kawakami?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: You... you actually noticed I was there?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I saw you from the paddock. So, what did
you think of my race?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, um, I thought it was stunning, of course. You
flew down the track like the wind.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You're certain I didn't appear like a villain while
in the paddock and winner's circle?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huh?! N-no, I didn't think that at all!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You can be honest. I'm aware that some see me
that way. Still...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I don't feel ashamed, nor do I think my conduct
was self-centered. Quite the contrary—I'm proud
that I stayed true to myself.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
And I don't intend on changing my approach,
even when I race against you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to give you a thrashing with everything I
have. That's how I show respect to those who
think to oppose me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
When I choose a course of action, what matters is
whether I myself can take pride in it. What others
think is of no concern to me.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
...Something I myself can be proud of, not
others...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I've been thinking... Thinking about the difference
between being self-centered and being myself.
choice_data_list: Did you come to a conclusion?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yes. It's true that my behavior before was
self-centered, and I'm ashamed of that.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But that's precisely why I can't simply succumb to
pressure. I won't be self-centered, but I must stay
true to myself.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
So... for next month's Fan Fest, I want to take
part in this event.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess shows me a plan for a stage
event.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Last Year's Tiara Tour in Retrospect!" A talk
show presented by glamorous Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It seems the Umamusume I competed against last
year will be there, as well as all their fans.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
A true princess wouldn't back down from an
opportunity like this just because she felt
intimidated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I see sincere determination burning in her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But somewhere deeper, I sense a subtle tremor—a
trembling accompanied by an eagerness to grow.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Right.
